_note: Gold expected-scholar sets for scholar-search relevance eval. Each name is a case-insensitive regex matched against preferredName. Expected scholars SHOULD rank high (not necessarily in this order). Domain-expert-provided except `hypertension`, whose list is analyst-derived (the true topical specialists found in docs/search-relevance-analysis.md §10). Add queries freely; keep regexes distinctive enough to avoid matching the wrong person.
